---
title: "Research Notebook"
subtitle: Working notes, ideas, and research in progress.
listing:
  id: list-of-posts

  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: true
  #sort-ui: true
  #filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true

css: system/styles/listing.css
---

This research notebook is a space for open and ongoing inquiry. It contains working notes, research ideas, methodological reflections, preliminary findings, and exploratory analyses. Entries are shared in the spirit of open scholarship: they document research in progress rather than finalized results. 

> ***This research notebook is a work in progress. New notes, ideas, and exploratory analyses will be added over time.***

::: {#list-of-posts style="display:none;"}
:::
